apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.subtitle: Complete API integration guide with OpenAI and Anthropic protocol support

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Our API service is fully compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic protocols, allowing you to seamlessly integrate 200+ AI models using existing SDKs and code.
overview.feature1: Fully compatible with OpenAI API format, easy switch

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: All API requests require a valid API key in the Authorization header.
auth.securityDescription: Keep your API keys secure. Never expose them in client-side code or public repositories. Create separate keys for different purposes with appropriate permissions and quota limits.

models.title: Available Models
models.description: We support various mainstream AI models from providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more.

chat.title: Chat Completions
chat.description: Create chat completion requests with support for multi-turn conversations and streaming output.
chat.streamingDescription: Set stream: true to enable streaming output and receive generated content in real-time.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: We charge based on token usage. Pricing varies by model.
pricing.billingNote: Billing is calculated based on actual token usage. Input and output tokens are priced separately.
pricing.tokenDescription: A token is the smallest unit of text processing. Generally, 1 Chinese character equals 1-2 tokens, and 1 English word equals 1-4 tokens.

sdks.title: SDK Integration
sdks.description: You can use the official OpenAI SDK to call our API by simply changing the base_url.
